friendly_name: Merge Abort, Review, and Status Hardening Sprint
purpose_context: Seven issues (#903–#909) were filed after completing mission auth-tranche-2-5-cli-contract-consumption. Two are confirmed bugs (merge --abort leaves orphaned lock files; force-approving a WP leaves rejected verdicts silently in place) and five are targeted enhancements that close gaps in review quality, error-message usability, linting discipline, status visibility, and post-merge lifecycle governance.
purpose_tldr: Fix merge abort cleanup, stale review verdict drift, opaque lane guard errors, and add mission review CLI gate plus stalled-reviewer detection.
